name: Saute Florentine
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Artichoke hearts, marinated and chopped into bite-size pieces
3 oz Celery, chopped into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the sunflower flour with onions, thyme, oregano, salt, soy sauce, and oil. Mix well.
2. Heat a skillet or wok over medium heat. Add the sunflower oil.
3. Add the flour mixture to the skillet and stir-fry for about 1 minute.
4. Add the chopped spinach, artichoke hearts (chopped into bite-size pieces), and celery (chopped into bite-size pieces).
5. Stir-fry the vegetables with the sunflower oil until they are tender, about 7 minutes.
6. Stir in the cooked brown rice and continue to stir-fry for an additional minute to combine all ingredients evenly.
